title: euonymus venosus
intro: Euonymus venosus, also known as the striped wahoo or American spindletree, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Euonymus venosus include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Euonymus venosus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and has also been used in poultices to treat external wounds and skin irritations.
